items.title: Sparks trail Lynx 68-67 after three. Los Angeles held a 9-point lead near the midpoint of the frame but turnovers (8 in the quarter) and fouls (gave up 8 FTA in the third) haunted them, allowing Minnesota to rattle off a 19-3 run. But Sparks fought back into it late.
items.author: Justin Russo

items.title: Also, another deal that shows the value of what little move *can* become. Pacers were able to sign Quenton Jackson to a two-way deal in 2024 because they gave Kendall Brown a standard deal and opened a two-way slot. Another chance to look at a young player, and he's still around.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Also, another deal that shows the value of what little move *can* become. Pacers were able to sign Quenton Jackson to a two-way deal in 2024 because they gave Kendall Brown a standard deal and opened a two-way slot. Another chance to look at a young player, and he's still around.

items.title: The Sparks are up 39-37 at the half over the Lynx. Neither team is shooting well, but Minnesota is struggling a ton. They are 0-11 from deep.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Sparks are up 39-37 at the half over the Lynx. Neither team is shooting well, but Minnesota is struggling a ton. They are 0-11 from deep.

items.title: Halftime: Sparks 39, Lynx 37. It was an ugly half for shooting—combined 2-for-23 on 3s—and turnovers—combined 17—but Los Angeles has played well for the most part in the half-court. Rae Burrell leads with 11 points and is +13; Nneka Ogwumike has 10; Cameron Brink with 7.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Sparks 39, Lynx 37. It was an ugly half for shooting—combined 2-for-23 on 3s—and turnovers—combined 17—but Los Angeles has played well for the most part in the half-court. Rae Burrell leads with 11 points and is +13; Nneka Ogwumike has 10; Cameron Brink with 7.

items.title: Consider wearing a mask if you have to work outside. We don't get the truly awful days here as much anymore as more people go electric, but it can make those days tolerable.
items.author: Dr. Justin Quinn
items.body_excerpt:
Consider wearing a mask if you have to work outside. We don't get the truly awful days here as much anymore as more people go electric, but it can make those days tolerable.

Avd if any anti-COVID weirdos bug you, just walk briskly away, they won't be able to keep up.

items.title: The driving lanes have been wide open for the Sky today with Cardoso out with injury. Seattle's poor perimeter defense is part of it, but the spacing looks great and the ball is moving. Chloe Bibby, who signed a couple weeks ago, adding more frontcourt shooting has been critical.

items.body_excerpt: The driving lanes have been wide open for the Sky today with Cardoso out with injury.
